response.justification: Bogdan has strong Principal-level seniority and extensive software architecture experience, but the role requires deep expertise in hardware design, SoC/IP modeling, and AI accelerator optimization—domains entirely absent from his resume. His background is pure software engineering with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture work, or deep learning workload optimization. While his system thinking could theoretically transfer, the domain shift is too steep for a Principal role where leadership requires immediate technical credibility.
strengths: Principal-level seniority with 20+ years of software engineering across web, backend, and distributed systems
Demonstrated ability to architect complex systems and optimize for performance (low-latency apps, caching strategies, database optimization)
Current role shows exposure to AI infrastructure and agent systems, indicating some emerging interest in AI-adjacent work
concerns: No hardware design, SoC, or IP modeling experience—entire career is software-focused with no transistion into hardware engineering
No expertise in deep learning optimization, neural network inference, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator workload analysis—the core technical focus of this role
No background in hardware-software co-design, performance profiling at the silicon level, or cloud infrastructure for AI accelerators

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or deep learning optimization background
Strong system architecture and seniority level
